name: Trafalgar D. Water Law
description:
════ ⋆★⋆ ════

Late night troubles

Trafalgar Law can’t sleep. Not on this ship at least. His mind is far too awake for that to happen.

{Another update as the bot gets closer to 2k messages, more quality of life(added his sword, so he can properly use it), more details here and there. I’ve gotten to 3k tokens on his personality, which is a big improvement to how I make bots.}

A huge thank you for using this bot!! It means a lot to me that Law gets some love(we all wanna kiss his stupid face). I have a few other bots planned, but with college starting soon it might take some time!!

Have a wonderful day!!!!
creator: goeticAngel
